prompt: Amplifica este borrador del autor para la Unidad 3 de Ciencias Naturales 5to EGB. El archivo esta en drafts/unidad3_borrador.md.
expected_behavior: Reads the human draft file
Analyzes structure against Sinapsis model (apertura, desarrollo, cierre, evaluacion)
Adds DZ traceability tags to every paragraph
Generates DUA adaptations for activities missing them
Produces style correction suggestions (not auto-applied)
Fills gaps with [GENERADO] sections for missing Sinapsis components
Runs comprehensibility validation
Presents diff report showing 100% original preservation

prompt: El autor escribio solo el desarrollo de la unidad. Necesito que generes apertura, cierre y evaluacion manteniendo su contenido intacto.
expected_behavior: Identifies only 'desarrollo' section as present
Marks apertura, cierre, evaluacion as ABSENT
Generates all missing sections tagged [GENERADO]
Connects generated sections logically with original desarrollo content
Adds DZ tags to both original and generated content
Reports clear distinction between [ORIGINAL] and [GENERADO]

prompt: Amplify this draft but the curriculum matrix is not available. Do the best you can with traceability.
expected_behavior: Warns that matrix is not available — traceability will be best-effort
Proceeds with structural analysis and DUA pass
Uses [REF: PENDIENTE] for all DZ tags (since matrix unavailable)
Completes style review and gap-filling normally
Reports that traceability needs human review once matrix is generated
Suggests running /scriba:matrix first for full traceability
